Function declaration for pushing a BLE heart rate monitor reminder popup.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a single function, [`ble_hrm_push_reminder_popup`](<#ble_hrm_push_reminder_popup>). The function is likely intended to trigger a reminder popup related to a Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) heart rate monitor (HRM). The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
